text_original: When the intelligent and animal souls are held together in one embrace, they can be kept from separating.
text_normalized: When the intelligent and animal souls are held together in one embrace, they can be kept from separating.

text_original: When one gives undivided attention to the (vital) breath, and brings it to the utmost degree of pliancy, he can become as a (tender) babe.
text_normalized: When one gives undivided attention to the (vital) breath, and brings it to the utmost degree of pliancy, he can become as a (tender) babe.

text_original: When he has cleansed away the most mysterious sights (of his imagination), he can become without a flaw.
text_normalized: When he has cleansed away the most mysterious sights (of his imagination), he can become without a flaw.

text_original: In loving the people and ruling the state, cannot he proceed without any (purpose of) action?
text_normalized: In loving the people and ruling the state, cannot he proceed without any (purpose of) action?

text_original: In the opening and shutting of his gates of heaven, cannot he do so as a female bird?
text_normalized: In the opening and shutting of his gates of heaven, cannot he do so as a female bird?

text_original: While his intelligence reaches in every direction, cannot he (appear to) be without knowledge?
text_normalized: While his intelligence reaches in every direction, cannot he (appear to) be without knowledge?

text_original: (The Dao) produces (all things) and nourishes them;
text_normalized: (The Dao) produces (all things) and nourishes them;

text_original: it produces them and does not claim them as its own;
text_normalized: it produces them and does not claim them as its own;

text_original: it does all, and yet does not boast of it;
text_normalized: it does all, and yet does not boast of it;

text_original: it presides over all, and yet does not control them.
text_normalized: it presides over all, and yet does not control them.

text_original: This is what is called 'The mysterious Quality' (of the Dao).
text_normalized: This is what is called 'The mysterious Quality' (of the Dao).
